nature.translate: природа, характер, сущность, натура, естество, тип, нрав, род, организм, сорт
mnemonic:
nature ['neɪʧə]
***
ПРИРОДУ зрим, от делать "неча". (это) nature

examples.eng: Custom is second nature.
You cannot alter your nature.
He has an amorous nature.
Capitalist society is by its very nature unstable.
examples.ru: Капиталистическое общество по самой своей природе является нестабильным.

examples.eng: Shelley was a nature poet.
Any government funding would be temporary in nature.
examples.ru: Любое государственное финансирование будет носить временный характер.

examples.eng: She has a warm and friendly nature.
examples.ru: У неё добрый и дружелюбный характер.

examples.eng: The support being given is of a practical nature.
Nature is perfectly balanced.
She is unsuspicious by nature.
He devoted himself to the study of nature.
You can't change human nature.
I never trouble myself with questions of that nature.
examples.ru: Я никогда не утруждаю себя вопросами такого рода.

examples.eng: He has a peaceable nature.
a sense of oneness with nature
All things in nature are dependent on one another.
The exact nature of the problem is not well understood.
examples.ru: Истинная природа данной проблемы понята не до конца.

examples.eng: Fashion is by nature ephemeral.
Ambition is alien to his nature.
Hunger is a cruel fact of nature.
He had a lifelong love of nature.
examples.ru: Он всю свою жизнь любил природу.

examples.eng: It is his nature to help others.
one of nature's greatest secrets
It is the nature of fire to burn.
He examined the nature of the relationship between the two communities.
examples.ru: Он изучил характер отношений между этими двумя общинами.

examples.eng: a cynical view of human nature
a compassionate person by nature
a person with a forgiving nature
She's very competitive by nature.
examples.ru: По своей природе она очень честолюбива.

examples.eng: this girl, so intimate with nature
examples.ru: эта девушка, столь близкая к природе
